root_text.an6.114:1.5: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya tayo dhammā bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an6.114:1.7: Asantuṭṭhitāya pahānāya santuṭṭhitā bhāvetabbā, asampajaññassa pahānāya sampajaññaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, mahicchatāya pahānāya appicchatā bhāvetabbā.
root_text.an6.114:1.8: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ dhammānaṁ pahānāya ime tayo dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an6.114:1.3: Lack of contentment, lack of situational awareness, and having many wishes.
translation_text.an6.114:1.5: To give up these three things you should develop three things.
translation_text.an6.114:1.7: You should develop contentment to give up lack of contentment, situational awareness to give up lack of situational awareness, and having few wishes to give up having many wishes.
translation_text.an6.114:1.8: These are the three things you should develop to give up those three things.”
